articles.title: Govt committed to safety and dignity of all: CM

articles.title: Iran envoy visits Ambedkarnagar’s Sufishrine, pitches for better ties with India
articles.description: Iran Supreme Leader’s representative Dr Abdul Majeed Hakeem Ilahi visits Kichauchha dargah in UP, prays for peace and stronger India-Iran ties, cites 5,000-year links.

articles.title: Over a third of pregnancies in city’s fringes classified as high-risk
articles.description: Hypothyroidism, repeat C-sections and gestational diabetes are driving a growing medical burden on mothers in peri-urban areas

articles.title: Man caught by residents when he returned to collect phone after attempted sexual assault of elderly woman
articles.description: Chennai: Drunk man, 35, caught by residents after returning to retrieve phone dropped while fleeing attempted sexual assault of 80-year-old woman near Tiruvallur.

articles.title: Water supply restored in Kolathur after six days
articles.description: Water supply restored in parts of Chennai after a major Puzhal pipeline burst disrupted service for six days; Metro Water completed emergency repairs and resumed distribution.

articles.title: Arun is new DVAC director
articles.description: Tamil Nadu govt appoints former Chennai police commissioner A Arun as DVAC director; ADGP T S Anbu named law and order, Maheshwar Dayal shifted to administration.

articles.title: Special buses announced ahead of Bakrid, long weekend
articles.description: TNSTC to run thousands of special buses across Tamil Nadu May 27–June 1 for Bakrid, Muhurtham days and extended weekend; 1 lakh+ advance bookings.

articles.title: BJP MP upset with Congress govt. delaying funds for hotels
articles.description: BJP MP Jagadish Shettar criticizes Congress for delaying ₹370 crore in funds for student hostels, impacting essential meal services.

articles.title: INDIA Bloc Under Strain: CPI(M)’s Attack On Congress Exposes Growing Fault Lines
articles.description: CPI(M) said the Congress’ approach towards regional allies and opposition parties was “not helpful in building the unity of secular forces in a united fight against the RSS-BJP”

articles.title: 'Mandatorily requesting': Trump calls on Saudi Arabia, Pakistan, Turkey and other Arab nations to join Abraham Accords
articles.description: The US president has called on countries like Saudi Arabia, Pakistan, Turkey, Jordan and more to join the Abraham Accords as part of a larger deal with Iran.

articles.title: Explained: How Centuries Old Cauvery Dispute Could Become An Early Challenge For TVK–Congress
articles.description: Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, Keralam and Puducherry have a long-standing dispute over the Cauvery River water, with the proposed Mekedatu dam being a new chapter in the conflict between the two bordering states.

articles.title: 'Highly Unacceptable': Farhan Akhtar's Don 3 Complaint Sparks Action; FWICE Bans Ranveer
articles.description: Reminders were sent on April 22, April 30 and May 13. However, the actor allegedly did not appear before the Federation of Western India Cine Employees.

articles.title: Why the West’s report card on India deserves far more scrutiny
articles.description: The problem with many global indices is not that they criticise India, but that they often claim scientific objectivity while relying on deeply contestable assumptions

articles.title: Chinese proverb of the day: 'The first decision of a woman is the most intelligent and the last decision is...' life lessons on decision-making, human behavior and how emotions can change decisions over time
articles.description: Chinese proverb of the day: Human decisions are shaped by emotions, with initial instincts often being the clearest. However, prolonged emotional buildup, stress, and conflict can lead to dangerous, unbalanced choices. This proverb highlights how emotional shifts influence judgment over time, impacting relationships and life decisions.

articles.title: 'Netanyahu’s IRAN WAR GOALS different from US’: Gabbard drops bombshell at explosive House hearing
articles.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard revealed a striking distinction between U.S. and Israeli objectives in the Iran conflict during a House hearing. Gabbard stated that US President Donald Trump’s goals focus on dismantling Tehran’s military capabilities, while Israel aims at disabling the Iranian leadership.

articles.title: Palaniswami, M K Stalin allege 'horse trading' as three rebel AIADMK MLAs quit party, join TVK
articles.description: AIADMK Turmoil: Three MLAs resign and join TVK, spurring allegations of 'horse trading' in Tamil Nadu's political scene. This move potentially shifts assembly power dynamics, while dissent within AIADMK signals further defections.

articles.title: Russia Hails ‘Hero’ Troops Who Cracked Ukraine’s Defensive Wall | Watch
articles.description: Russia is signaling that its war machine is far from slowing down. Right after unleashing one of the largest combined air assaults of the war, Russian Defence Minister Andrei Belousov has made a surprise frontline visit to the Vostok Group of Forces. Meeting with senior field commanders and awarding combat medals, Belousov’s appearance projects absolute confidence as panic grips Western intelligence. Ukrainian analysts claim Russia may have debuted an RS-26 Rubezh intermediate-range ballistic missile—known as the "Oreshnik"—to smash through Kyiv’s air shield. Watch the breakdown of this dangerous new phase.

articles.title: Trump pushes Muslim leaders to join Abraham Accords after war with Iran ends
articles.description: Trump held talks with leaders of Saudi Arabia, UAE, Qatar, Pakistan, Turkey, Egypt, Jordan and Bahrain on the emerging Iran deal.

articles.title: D V Sadananda Gowda stakes claim for Rajya Sabha berth, says he has informed party leadership
articles.description: Karnataka BJP Politics: D V Sadananda Gowda voices ambition for a Rajya Sabha position, while speculations surround HD Deve Gowda's future. BJP-JD(S) alliance's stance on state leadership and Congress criticisms amidst state corruption claims.

articles.title: How is My Friend PM Modi?: Sergio Gor Reveals Trump’s Regular Question During Calls | Politics
articles.description: Sergio Gor revealed a warm detail about the bond between Donald Trump and Narendra Modi. Speaking in New Delhi, Gor said Trump often begins their conversations by asking, 'How is my friend, the Prime Minister Modi, doing?' He added that the India-US relationship is deep-rooted and continues to grow stronger. In this video: 00:00 – ‘How is My Friend PM Modi?’: Trump’s Warm Remark 01:10 – Sergio Shares Trump-Modi Bond Details 06:30 – Marco Rubio Also Speaks Up During Delhi Event

articles.title: Trump exposes own failure in striking deal with Iran as talks stall again
articles.description: Donald Trump appears to slow the Iran deal push after Tehran pushes back on key U.S. demands involving nuclear talks and the Strait of Hormuz. As negotiations stall, Washington signals growing urgency while Iran insists its conditions must come first. Marco Rubio also warned that a complex nuclear agreement cannot be finalized quickly, highlighting deep divisions still blocking a final deal.

articles.title: Twisha Sharma's Husband "Not Cooperating" With Investigators: Sources
articles.description: Twisha Sharma married Samarth Singh last December. Five months later, she was dead

articles.title: 'Don't take it so sentimentally': CJI Surya Kant on 'Cockroach Janata Party' row
articles.description: “Don’t take it so sentimentally,” CJI Surya Kant responded, adding that there was “no such grave urgency” in the matter and that the pleas would be considered “in due course”.

articles.title: TMC MP Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar quits Barasat post, slams I-PAC for 'ruining' party
articles.description: Dastifar appealed to party chairperson and former West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee to rely on veteran party workers rather than “external consultants”.

articles.title: US ignores ally's cry for help as China looms large near Taiwan, Japan
articles.description: Japan is warning of growing security pressure as China and Russia rapidly expand military operations near its borders. Tokyo fears its ageing fighter fleet may struggle to match Beijing’s fast-paced modernization, while delays in upgrades and limited missile reserves add to concerns. Rising Russian bomber patrols and China’s advanced J-15B fighters are intensifying fears of a larger Pacific military showdown.

articles.title: Bhumi Pednekar reacts strongly to viral groping video; links it to women’s safety crisis
articles.description: Bhumi Pednekar strongly reacted to a disturbing viral video showing men making obscene gestures towards a woman’s mural near a swimming pool. Calling it a reflection of a dangerous mindset, the actress demanded stricter laws and accountability. Her reaction comes amid nationwide outrage over alleged dowry harassment cases involving Twisha Sharma and Deepika Nagar. The incidents have reignited conversations around misogyny, women’s safety, casual sexism and the deeper societal attitudes that continue to normalise disrespect towards women in everyday life.

articles.title: Trump Plans To Create State Citizenship Lists To Determine Who Can Vote: Here's How It May Backfire
articles.description: Trump signed an executive order in March directing the Department of Homeland Security to prepare state-by-state citizenship lists to exclude 'non-citizens' from voting.

articles.title: ‘Never Came Up’: Rubio Says India Did Not Raise Pakistan’s Iran Mediation Role During Talks
articles.description: The US Secretary underlined that India’s concerns with Pakistan stem from a separate set of issues. "I mean, their issue with Pakistan is different," he added.

articles.title: UCC Bill introduced in Assam Assembly
articles.description: Assam's UCC Bill aims to ban polygamy and mandate live-in relationship registration, sparking opposition calls for broader consultation.

articles.title: 'Can you give us a Falta-like margin?': Suvendu Adhikari targets big BJP win in Nandigram
articles.description: The BJP recently secured a landslide win in the Falta repoll, with party candidate Debangshu Panda defeating CPI(M)’s Sambhu Nath Kurmi by over 1.09 lakh votes.

articles.title: Assam Introduces Uniform Civil Code Bill: Marriage, Inheritance On Agenda
articles.description: Assam Introduces Uniform Civil Code Bill: Marriage, Inheritance On Agenda

articles.title: Xi Jinping 'SIDELINES' Trump; Floats China's Own 5-point Iran Formula With Principal Mediator
articles.description: A dramatic new twist has emerged in the Iran-US crisis after reports claimed a secret Sino-Pakistani framework may be shaping a possible ceasefire deal. Diplomatic sources say China and Pakistan proposed a sweeping regional roadmap involving the Strait of Hormuz, sanctions relief, frozen Iranian assets and a new Gulf security structure that could weaken US dominance in the region. The explosive proposal reportedly pushes Washington into accepting a multi-power order where Beijing, Moscow, and regional players gain major influence over the post-war Middle East.

articles.title: ‘Detect, Delete And Deport’: Suvendu Adhikari Unveils Trump-Style Crackdown On Illegal Immigrants In Bengal
articles.description: Soon after taking charge as West Bengal chief minister, Suvendu Adhikari announced a strict drive against illegal Bangladeshi immigrants residing in the state.

articles.title: Russia’s Oreshnik: What makes the multi-warhead ballistic missile used against Ukraine so hard to stop
articles.description: Russia unleashed a fierce assault on Kyiv, deploying the nuclear-capable Oreshnik hypersonic missile alongside numerous drones and other advanced weaponry. This escalation followed Moscow's accusations of Ukrainian strikes on a student dormitory, which Kyiv denied.

articles.title: Differences of opinion
articles.description: Differences of opinion are immensely beneficial. They help bring to the fore new dimensions of issues under discussion and to uncover hitherto hidden aspects of a subject.

articles.title: Communal tension erupts in Karnataka’s Bhatkal over religious structure; prohibitory orders imposed
articles.description: Tension flared in Bhatkal's Murinakatta after a disputed religious structure was rebuilt. Muslim community members objected, leading to a confrontation where some allegedly tried to dismantle the shrine. Police intervened with a lathi charge to restore order. Hindu groups condemned the youths' actions, alleging attempts to disrupt harmony, and planned protests.

articles.title: Assam govt tables UCC legislation, becomes third BJP-ruled state to do so
articles.description: Chief minister Himanta Biswa Sarma said tribals will be kept outside the purview of UCC in line with similar provisions in Uttarakhand and Gujarat.

articles.title: Republicans clash with Trump over payouts tied to ‘weaponization’ claims
articles.description: Republicans in the US Congress are opposing President Donald Trump's proposed $1.776 billion fund for alleged victims of government weaponization. This has sparked a significant political battle ahead of the midterm elections. The controversy is intensifying as lawmakers return from recess, with Democrats also planning to challenge the fund. The outcome could impact upcoming elections.

articles.title: Campaigning ends in Colombia as left fights to stay in power
articles.description: Campaigning for Colombia's May 31 presidential elections wrapped up Sunday, with the left battling to hold on to power during a dramatic uptick in violence. De la Espriella campaigned at a packed bullring in the northwestern city of Medellin, calling for a crackdown on drug trafficking and the crimes it funds.

articles.title: What is Oreshnik? Russia deploys nuclear-capable missile in massive Ukraine attack
articles.description: Russia’s use of its nuclear-capable Oreshnik hypersonic missile in a major strike on Ukraine has raised fresh fears of escalation and renewed concerns over the deployment of advanced weapons in the w

articles.title: Is Donald Trump losing Iran war? ​Strait of Hormuz holds key
articles.description: Donald Trump is now at risk of seeing the U.S. and its Gulf Arab allies emerge from the conflict worse off while Iran, though battered militarily and economically.

articles.title: SC to Hear FAIMA, UDF Pleas Seeking NTA Dissolution After NEET UG 2026 Leak
articles.description: The apex court will hear the petitions of FAIMA and UDF urging for the dissolution of NTA and the constitution of a monitoring committee. Read on to know their demands.

articles.title: Today Breaking News | সকাল ৭-টার বড় খবর | Suvendu Adhikari | Falta Election Results| Weather News
articles.description: Today Breaking News | সকাল ৭-টার বড় খবর | Suvendu Adhikari | Falta Election Results| Weather NewsNandigram Repoll | নন্দীগ্রামে না শেখ সুফিয়ানের। উপনির্বাচনে তৃণমূলের হয়ে লড়তে তিনি নারাজ। আগেই মুখ ফিরিয়েছেন পবিত্র কর। এবার বেঁকে বসলেন শেখ সুফিয়ান। বিজেপি কটাক্ষ করে বলছে, নন্দীগ্রামে তৃণমূল প্রার্থী দাঁড় করাতে পারবে তো। Suvendu Adhikari | মুখ্যমন্ত্রী হওয়ার পরে প্রথমবার নন্দীগ্রামে সভা করলেন শুভেন্দু অধিকারী। জোড়া কেন্দ্রে জিতে ভবানীপুর রেখেছেন। নন্দীগ্রাম ছেড়েছেন। নন্দীগ্রাম ছাড়লেও, আগের মতোই নন্দীগ্রামের পাশে থাকবেন। বার্তা মুখ্যমন্ত্রীর। Haldia News | হলদিয়ার উন্নয়নে নজর মুখ্যমন্ত্রীর। নভেম্বরে হলদিয়ায় পুরভোট: প্রদীপ বিজলি। বৈঠক শেষে জানান হলদিয়ার বিজেপি বিধায়ক প্রদীপ বিজলি। হলদিয়ার উন্নয়নে গতি আনতে রোড ম্যাপ তৈরি। হলদিয়ায় প্রশাসনিক বৈঠকে রোড ম্যাপ তৈরি মুখ্যমন্ত্রীর। হলদিয়ায় দ্রুত পুরভোট করার নির্দেশ মুখ্যমন্ত্রীর। n18oc_kolkataWatch Bangla News Live for the latest updates on the Falta Assembly repoll result, vote counting trends from West Bengal, Suvendu Adhikari’s felicitation in Nandigram, WBJEE exam updates, KKR vs Delhi Capitals IPL 2026 match updates at Eden Gardens, Chandranath Rath murder case updates, Sukanta Majumdar’s Siliguri visit, Agnimitra Paul’s Asansol meeting, Marco Rubio’s India visit, severe heatwave alert updates in Bengal and how to stay hydrated, French Open 2026 news, and major political news, latest sports updates, lifestyle updates, entertainment news, Bollywood and Tollywood news; stay connected with Bengali news, Bengal election news, IPL 2026 updates, weather news, politics, crime, entertainment, and breaking updates from India and around the world on News18 Bangla.

articles.title: Ladakh’s struggle for constitutional protection finds resonance in Kashmir
articles.description: Valley leaders say that the Ladakh struggle holds many lessons for the J&K leadership while some question why J&K was “being singled out & stripped of safeguards”.

articles.title: ‘Won’t Rush’: Trump Hits Brakes On Iran Peace Talks A Day After Deal ‘Largely Negotiated’ Claim
articles.description: Despite President Donald Trump announcing that a peace agreement with Iran has been “largely negotiated," the White House has said that the deal could take days to finalise.

articles.title: ‘Declare Tiny Tom a public nuisance’: M.A. Nishad takes dig at actor as AMMA controversy escalates; Lakshmipriya breaks silence
articles.description: Filmmaker M.A. Nishad satirically suggested Tiny Tom be declared a public nuisance amidst allegations of verbal abuse and threats by actresses Nina Kurup and Ansiba Hassan at an AMMA event. The controversy escalated with claims of Ansiba being called a "jihadi." Actress Lakshmipriya confirmed filing a police complaint against Ansiba.

articles.title: Travis Head's Wife Abused By Fans After Viral Virat Kohli Clash: 'Woke Up To My Socials Blasting'
articles.description: Travis Head and wife Jessica report renewed online abuse from Indian fans after a heated IPL clash with Virat Kohli, citing threats to family and calling for kinder fan behavior
